name: Pierre Kœnig
longDesc: Pierre Kœnig commande la 1re brigade française libre à Bir Hakeim, bataille de retardement qui tient seize jours contre Rommel en juin 1942. Carte WC4 infanterie A argent à bonus défense en terrain ouvert : pick thématique désert côté France libre.

skills.name: Fighting Spirit
skills.desc: After commanding a troop to counterattack, +16 HP to yourself and surrounding friendly troops.

skills.name: Infantry Leader
skills.desc: 16% chance to give the enemy a critical attack when commanding infantry units

skills.name: Crossfire
skills.desc: Counter attack +18% when attacked by the enemy on land

skills.name: Emplacement libre
skills.desc: Compétence apprenable — à remplir via l'Académie.

sources: Données extraites des fichiers de jeu World Conqueror 4
longDescEn: Pierre Kœnig commanded the 1st Free French Brigade at Bir Hakeim, a delay action that held sixteen days against Rommel in June 1942. A WC4 silver-A infantry card with open-terrain defence bonuses — a thematic desert pick for Free France.
longDescDe: Pierre Kœnig führte die 1. Freifranzösische Brigade bei Bir Hakeim und hielt im Juni 1942 sechzehn Tage lang Rommel stand. Im WC4 eine Silber-A-Infanteriekarte mit Offenland-Defensivboni — thematische Wüstenwahl für das Freie Frankreich.
